prompt: 当前新老交替，发掘所有迷惑、上下矛盾、代码/文档不一致、不管严重与否的问题或者 bug

dimensions.name: command-surface-drift
dimensions.criteria: Current CLI registry/help/tests disagree with docs, README, examples, snapshots, or migration notes.

dimensions.name: knowledge-tool-terminology-drift
dimensions.criteria: Old rule terminology or retired MCP tool names still appear as current behavior.

dimensions.name: server-http-surface-drift
dimensions.criteria: Quarantined HTTP/server surfaces are still documented, tested, or presented as mainline.

dimensions.name: install-hook-skill-source-drift
dimensions.criteria: Install, hook, bootstrap, and skill sources of truth diverge or duplicate active behavior.

dimensions.name: schema-issue-metadata-contract-drift
dimensions.criteria: Persisted issue/knowledge/schema/event contracts disagree with docs or implementation.
